inputs.titre: Loi Le Chapelier interdisant les corporations

reason: The image depicts a Parisian street scene with citizens gathered, seemingly discussing a new law, possibly the Le Chapelier Law given the clothing and setting. The clothing appears generally accurate for the late 18th century, with frock coats, tricorn hats, and high-waisted dresses visible. The cobblestone streets and stone building facades are consistent with the period. There are some inconsistencies in the cut of the clothing that make it not quite as accurate as it could be. The sign text also looks a bit off, likely due to AI generation. Overall the depiction is good but could be improved for accuracy.
